title: Stupid Berry Bushes!
description: Makes the Players Invulnerable to the Berry bush de-buff such as pricks and Slow downs, while the mobs remain Vulnerable to it! WE know how to navigate fast through it, right?
body:
# Stupid Berry Bushes!
**SBB** (**S**tupid **B**erry **B**ushes) Is a slight QOL mod, where you **wont** be taking any **Damage from Berry Bushes**! **No pricks**! **No slow downs**! No **nothing**!

Also includes when trying to _clutch with it from Certain heights_ (which nobody ever does) so probably don't have this _installed_.

**However**, Mobs (_friendly or non-firendly, modded included_) **will be Vulnerable** to these **De-buffs**, taking damage from pricks and being slowed down. [No farms will be affected that use Berry Bushes)

## Info
If (_and that's IF_) there is any issues with this mod, such as random crashes occured by Other mods or etc.

Please create a forum on our discord server with as much details as possible.

This mod SHOULD be working for every version beyond 1.21.8

# HELP WANTED!

If there are any other mods that include Bushes, please mention them in my Discord server so it can be affected the same way as this mod!

(Along it will be a Config List)

![HELP WANTED!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4bb61fc35210cabbc67a0d10e598786261c3163_0.webp)
